scripts.build:mac: bun build:mac:arm64 && bun build:mac:universal && node scripts/release-mac.mjs
scripts.build:mac:arm64: bun generate && bun build:native:haptics && bun run build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder bun exec electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.json && bun verify:packaged-prisma
scripts.build:mac:universal: bun generate && bun build:native:haptics && bun run build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder bun exec electron-builder --mac --universal --config electron-builder.json && bun verify:packaged-prisma
scripts.build:win:x64: bun generate && bun run build && bun exec electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.json --publish never
scripts.build:win:arm64: bun generate && bun run build && bun exec electron-builder --win --arm64 --config electron-builder.json --publish never
scripts.build:linux: bun generate && bun run build && bun exec electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.json
scripts.postinstall: bun generate:prisma && node scripts/sync-prisma-client.mjs && bun run rebuild:electron && bun build:native:haptics
scripts.generate: bun generate:icons && bun generate:prisma && node scripts/sync-prisma-client.mjs
scripts.lint-all: bun run check:deps && bun run check:no-native-dialogs && bun run check:i18n-parity && bun run check:no-escape-hatches && bun run check:version-pins && bun run check:ipc-contract-map && bun run check:ipc-handler-schemas && bun run check:security-profile && bun run check:renderer-store-usage && bun run check:persist-contracts && bun run check:preload-contract-regression && eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx
scripts.qa:core: bun -s typecheck && bun -s lint && bun -s check:renderer-store-usage && bun -s check:ipc-handler-schemas && bun -s check:persist-contracts && bun -s check:core-complexity && bun -s check:target-file-drift && bun -s check:build-warning-regression && SKIP_DB_TEST_SETUP=1 bun -s vitest tests/main/lifecycle/deepLink.test.ts tests/main/handler/ipcWindowHandlers.test.ts tests/main/handler/ipcInputValidation.test.ts tests/main/services/syncAuthService.test.ts tests/main/services/syncService.test.ts tests/main/services/syncMapper.test.ts tests/main/services/syncRepository.test.ts tests/main/services/exportService.test.ts tests/renderer/hooks/useTermDragDrop.test.ts tests/renderer/services/exportEntryService.test.ts tests/renderer/services/worldPackageStorage.test.ts tests/renderer/stores/projectLayoutStore.test.ts tests/renderer/stores/projectLayoutStore.persist.test.ts tests/renderer/stores/uiStore.persist.test.ts tests/renderer/stores/memoStore.test.ts tests/renderer/utils/sanitizeHtml.test.ts tests/shared/utils/exportContentNormalization.test.ts tests/dom/focusHoverSidebar.test.tsx tests/dom/rendererRerenderRegression.test.tsx tests/dom/appOperationalScenarios.test.tsx tests/dom/projectInitOperationalScenarios.test.tsx tests/scripts/buildWarningNormalization.test.ts tests/scripts/preloadContractRegression.test.ts tests/scripts/ipcContractMap.test.ts tests/scripts/ipcHandlerSchemas.test.ts tests/scripts/dependencyIntegrity.test.ts tests/scripts/securityProfile.test.ts tests/scripts/rendererStoreUsage.test.ts tests/scripts/persistContracts.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: bun test:prepare && bun build && playwright test --project=e2e
scripts.test:stress: bun test:prepare && bun build && playwright test --project=stress
scripts.test:smoke: bun test:prepare && bun build && playwright test --project=smoke
